Animations

A live showcase of what Starling animates today — declarative @keyframes, CSS transitions, and the JS Web Animations API.

Declarative @keyframes

Pure CSS, no script. Interpolates transforms, color, opacity and length; honours duration, easing, iteration, direction and delay.

CSS transitions

State-driven easing. Hover the tiles — transform, background and colour ease between states.

Web Animations API JS

element.animate() driven from JavaScript, with live playback controls. The box below is animated by script, not CSS.

animate()

idle · 0 ms

Rendered by the Starling browser engine.
